rationale: The `unknown` bucket is heterogeneous (shape fingerprinting failed) but dominated by sync generators that iterate `input.split("\n")` or `input.matchAll(...)`. On input `""`: most variants yield `[]` (empty lines / no regex matches). Outliers: variants that return a command-array (grep / bash shell-outs) will `fail` compareResults — shape-too-loose. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `""` yields `[]`. Converts ~65 / 73 generators.
